---
# SETTLED — 2026-06-06. Profiles of real-world benchmarks.
title: "Game/Experience Title"
type: exemplar
medium: ""           # interactive-fiction | live-game | tabletop | puzzle-hunt
year: ""             # Release year
designer: ""         # Individual or studio
mechanisms: []       # Links to canonical entries
provenance: ""       # corpus | researched | synthesis
---

## Overview
<!-- 1-2 paragraphs on the cultural and design significance. -->

## The Design Profile
<!-- How this work functions as an exemplar. What can we learn from it? -->

::: {.callout-note}
### The Signature
The specific mechanism or interaction that defines this work. [corpus]
:::

## Mechanisms Illustrated
<!-- List of mechanisms with brief notes on how they manifest here. -->

## The Stat Block
<!-- move data-dense stats to this table -->
| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Players   |       |
| Duration  |       |
| Substrate |       |
